inputs.label: Measurement System
inputs.businessContext: 0 = Metric (kg, cm), 1 = Imperial (stones, pounds, feet, inches)

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 = Metric (kg, cm), 1 = Imperial (stones, pounds, feet, inches)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 0 = Metrik (kg, cm), 1 = İmparatorluk (stone, pound, fit, inç)

inputs.label: Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Body weight in kilograms, used when Metric system selected

businessContext_i18n.en: Body weight in kilograms, used when Metric system selected
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vücut ağırlığı (kg), Metrik sistem seçildiğinde kullanılır

inputs.label: Height (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Body height in centimeters, used when Metric system selected

businessContext_i18n.en: Body height in centimeters, used when Metric system selected
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vücut boyu (cm), Metrik sistem seçildiğinde kullanılır

inputs.label: Weight - Stones
inputs.businessContext: Whole number of stones, used when Imperial system selected

businessContext_i18n.en: Whole number of stones, used when Imperial system selected
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam stone sayısı, İmparatorluk sistemi seçildiğinde kullanılır

inputs.label: Weight - Pounds
inputs.businessContext: Additional pounds beyond stones, used when Imperial system selected

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional pounds beyond stones, used when Imperial system selected
businessContext_i18n.tr: Stone'ların ötesindeki ek pound, İmparatorluk sistemi seçildiğinde kullanılır

inputs.label: Height - Feet
inputs.businessContext: Whole number of feet, used when Imperial system selected

businessContext_i18n.en: Whole number of feet, used when Imperial system selected
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam fit sayısı, İmparatorluk sistemi seçildiğinde kullanılır

inputs.label: Height - Inches
inputs.businessContext: Additional inches beyond feet, used when Imperial system selected

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional inches beyond feet, used when Imperial system selected
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fit'in ötesindeki ek inç, İmparatorluk sistemi seçildiğinde kullanılır

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
